name: Southwestern Meatball Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, pork, rice, egg, oregano, 1 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon pepper (or to taste) in a large bowl.
2. Shape into small balls, about the size of golf balls.
3. Saute onion and garlic in heated oil in a large kettle until tender.
4. Mix in tomato paste.
5. Add bouillon; season with salt and pepper.
6. Bring to a boil.
7. Add meatballs and reduce heat.
8. Cook slowly, covered, about 30 minutes, until meatballs are cooked.
9. Stir in coriander or parsley.
10. Serves 6 to 8.
